pk_tuples.notes: Population PK model prediction for VVC patients, 300 mg BID x1 day (total 600mg/day). AUC0-24=6832 (15%CV) ng*h/mL, Cmax=435 (15%CV) ng/mL under fasted conditions. Citrate salt tablet formulation.
Population PK model prediction for VVC patients, 300 mg BID x1 day under fed conditions. AUC0-24=9867 (15%CV) ng*h/mL, Cmax=629 (15%CV) ng/mL.
